case_title: CSAC EXCESS INSURANCE AUTHORITY VS. ACE XPRESS CHARTER ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 62824850) FILED BY DEFENDANT ACE XPRESS CHARTER JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 7.0 DAYS

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CSAC EXCESS INSURANCE AUTHORITY'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-18-565615 WITH CASE CGC-18-566912. THE COURT HAVING REVIEWED THE PLEADINGS AND HAVING HEARD ORAL ARGUMENT RULES AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF CSAC EXCESS INSURANCE AUTHORITY'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE CASE NOS. CGC-18-566912 AND CGC-18-565615 IS GRANTED. (FOR ALL PURPOSES) ALL FUTURE FILINGS SHALL BE MADE UNDER CASE NO. CGC-18-565615 AS THE LOW-NUMBERED CASE. (LEAD CASE). ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-11-2019 Continued To Mar-13-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-18-565615 WITH CASE CGC-18-566912
Off Calendar Jan-22-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
S. Henslee Smith, Esq. 714-730-0220 for Plaintiff through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. Plaintiff reports he did not receive any Opposition. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF CSAC EXCESS INSURANCE AUTHORITY's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-18-565615 WITH CASE CGC-18-566912.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Plaintiff CSAC Excess Insurance Authority's unopposed motion to consolidate Case Nos. CGC-18-566912 and CGC-18-565615 is granted. (for all purposes) All future filings shall be made under Case No. CGC-18-565615 as the low-numbered case. (lead case)(as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
